response: Steve Sekely and William King Baggot were both known by multiple names or nicknames. Steve Sekely, born Székely István, was known by several names due to his changing professional and immigration status. William King Baggot, an American actor and film director, was referred to as "King of the Movies," "The Most Photographed Man in the World," and "The Man Whose Face Is As Familiar As The Man In The Moon."
